creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
After I turned in my src commit bit, I created a new account with my personal email address. Since I rejoined the FreeBSD project a week or so ago, it would be nice to merge my accounts together again for simplicity (and to also correct the spelling for my account name as well :D..).

Please feel free to reach out to me over ngie@FreeBSD.org to confirm my identity. I will reply with my PGP key for yaneurabeya@gmail.com .

Thanks so very much :)!!
